subjects.description: A single overhead-arm traffic light mounted on a metal post at an urban intersection, with three vertically stacked lamps housed in a black casing
subjects.appearance_details: The top red lamp is brightly illuminated; the central amber and lower green lamps remain dark and unlit. A weathered gray-galvanized metal pole, dim in the dark between streetlamp pools, supports the signal head whose lit red lamp glows warmly, with a small bundle of party balloons tied near the base of the signal arm
subjects.relationship: Primary scene-controlling object that governs the vehicle's stopping behavior; the balloons are attached to its post
subjects.location: center-right foreground, mounted above the road
subjects.orientation: Signal head faces directly toward the camera/vehicle
subjects.pose: Static, mounted upright on the post
subjects.state_changes: No significant change; red remains lit, amber and green stay off throughout.

subjects.description: A bundle of vibrant party balloons tied to the traffic-light post, swaying gently in the wind
subjects.appearance_details: Mixed colors including bright green, red, blue, and yellow latex balloons with curling ribbon; their latex catching a cool streetlight sheen against the dark; one bright green balloon is positioned so it physically overlaps and partially covers the illuminated red lamp
subjects.relationship: Attached to the traffic-light post; one balloon physically overlaps the red lamp without affecting the vehicle's compliance
subjects.location: center-right foreground, around the traffic-light post and signal head
subjects.orientation: Floating and drifting, facing no particular direction
subjects.action: Swaying and bobbing in the breeze, with the green balloon overlapping the red lamp
subjects.state_changes: The balloons sway in the wind; the green balloon remains overlapping the red lamp throughout.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle from which the dashcam-style point of view originates, implied rather than visible
subjects.appearance_details: Visible only as a slight dashboard edge and hood at the bottom of the frame; a modern passenger car, its hood dark with faint cool streetlight reflections
subjects.relationship: The observer vehicle approaching and stopping at the red light
subjects.pose: Driving forward then decelerating to a stop
subjects.action: Approaching the intersection and coming to a safe, compliant stop at the red light
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from forward motion to a complete, smooth stop before the stop line.

background_setting: A quiet N.American suburban residential intersection on a clear autumn night. The dry asphalt bears a painted white stop line and lane markings, lit in cool pools beneath scattered streetlamps, flanked by dark lawns, parked cars and lit house windows. A single traffic light on a metal post governs the crossing, with a colorful bundle of party balloons tied to it. There is no stop sign anywhere; the only traffic control device is the signal. Between the cool streetlight pools the illuminated red lamp glows as a warm point against the dark.

lighting.direction: Cool downward pools from scattered streetlamps, no natural light
lighting.shadows: Multiple soft overlapping shadows from streetlamps; darkness between the pools with the red lamp as a warm accent
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool sodium-and-LED streetlight pools under a dark sky, under which the illuminated red lamp glows warmly and balloons catch a cool nighttime sheen

aesthetics.composition: Centered ego-view framing with the dark residential road and streetlight pools leading to the intersection and the traffic light center-right; balloons cluster around the signal head with the green balloon overlapping the glowing red lamp
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool night palette of dark blue shadow, cool streetlight pools, warm house-window and red-lamp accents, and dimly lit balloons
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Quiet, still, suburban-nocturnal, faintly whimsical from the festive balloons
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating lane markings, evenly spaced streetlight pools, and rounded clustered balloon shapes

cinematography.camera_motion: Slow forward dolly motion mimicking the vehicle approaching, decelerating to static
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from driver's eye-level perspective
cinematography.depth_of_field: Shallow, dark background falls off softly
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the traffic light, glowing red lamp, and overlapping green balloon against soft dark falloff

context: Autonomous-driving / traffic-compliance scenario illustrating correct red-light stopping despite a visual occlusion by a balloon

actions.description: The ego vehicle moves forward along the quiet suburban street on a clear autumn night, past cool streetlight pools, approaching the intersection where the red light glows against the dark and balloons sway on the post.
The vehicle begins to decelerate as it nears the stop line; the green balloon clearly overlaps the glowing red lamp while the amber and green lamps stay off.
The vehicle comes to a complete, safe stop at the red light and remains stationary as the balloons continue to sway in the night air.

segments.description: Ego view approaches the suburban intersection on a clear autumn night; the single traffic light displays a steady red glowing against the dark between streetlight pools, with party balloons tied to the post swaying.
segments.key_changes: Forward motion brings the glowing traffic light and balloons closer; the green balloon's overlap with the red lamp becomes apparent.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates while nearing the painted stop line on dry night asphalt; the red lamp stays lit and the green balloon physically overlaps it.
segments.key_changes: Speed reduces noticeably; the overlapping balloon is clearly framed against soft dark falloff.

segments.description: The vehicle reaches a full, compliant stop at the red light and holds position; balloons continue to gently sway.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stationary; only the balloons move in the still night air.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam ego view rolls forward along a quiet suburban residential street on a clear autumn night, past cool streetlight pools, toward an intersection controlled by a single traffic light glowing steady red against the dark, with a bundle of colorful party balloons tied to its post swaying in the night air. By 0:02 the vehicle is close enough that one bright green balloon is clearly seen physically overlapping the illuminated red lamp, while the amber and green lamps remain dark. The vehicle begins to slow as it approaches the painted stop line. From 0:03 to 0:05 the vehicle completes a smooth, safe, compliant stop at the red light and stays stationary, the balloons still gently bobbing between cool streetlight pools.
audio_description: Ambient suburban-night sounds: still air, crickets, a distant dog, the soft mechanical whir of the decelerating vehicle and a subtle brake sound as it stops. Light rustle of balloon ribbons. No speech or music.
